metadata.title: DetailedPlanStep — blueprint for a single atomic action

description: A plan step enriched with code specifications — the Blueprint for a single AtomicAction (src/shared/models/workflow_models.py). Created via from_execution_task(task: ExecutionTask, code: str | None) classmethod. NOTE: ExecutionTask.task_type is silently dropped at this conversion boundary — task_type carries ADR-003 routing semantics (code_generation, test_generation, code_modification) that are not propagated into DetailedPlanStep. The get_steps_requiring_code() method on sibling DetailedPlan hardcodes four action names ({file.create, file.edit, create_file, edit_file}) — two are valid registry IDs, two are legacy names not in the registry. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

action.description: The AtomicAction identifier for this step. e.g. 'file.edit'. Maps from ExecutionTask.action.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this step does. Maps from ExecutionTask.step.

params.description: Parameters for the action. Populated from ExecutionTask.params.model_dump(exclude_none=True).

is_critical.description: Whether failure of this step should halt the plan. Default True.

metadata.description: Step-level metadata (dict[str, Any]). Populated by from_execution_task with original_task and task_action fields. Default empty dict.
